title: stelis exigua
intro: Stelis exigua is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis exigua include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Stelis exigua can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
